analyzeUiError.message: Local preview is configured for this environment.

plan.title: Visual Input
plan.body: Dashboard guided layout: landscape admin dashboard.

plan.title: Layout Read
plan.body: Detect a dashboard-style shell with a sticky header, four-up stat grid, wide analytics band, and right-rail activity list.

plan.title: Component Map
plan.body: Build Header, WorkflowBanner, StatCard grid, RevenueCard (Recharts), ChartPreview (Chart.js donut), ActivityList, QuickActionButton row, and Footer.

plan.title: Accessibility Pass
plan.body: Semantic landmarks, 44px primary targets (Fitts), staged decisions (Hick), familiar dashboard patterns (Jakob), and chart values exposed to assistive tech.

plan.title: Human Review
plan.body: Verify spacing against the source screenshot, connect product API data, and swap chart libraries if product standards require it.

artifact.summary: Admin dashboard shell with stat grid, revenue chart, and activity feed.

sampleArtifact.summary: Admin dashboard shell with stat grid, revenue chart, and activity feed.
